item.title: About PaDel’s Technology
item.description:
PaDel’s Technology (Padelstech) is a personal technology brand created by Paul-Joseph and Delfina.

The name “PaDel” combines both of our names — representing a shared interest in building, learning, and experimenting with technology.

This site is where we document:

  • Software development work
  • Cloud and architecture projects
  • Electronics and maker builds
  • Ideas worth exploring

Padelstech is not a company (yet) — it’s a foundation.
